titleStmt.title: SII 34.365: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 365. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the second gōpura, right of entrance, in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Bokkaṇa-uḍaiyar, Subhānu, Āvaṇi 22 = A.D. 1403, August 20.

This records that Narasiṅgadēva, a chief of Pērāmbūr in Vaḍa-Kōṉāḍu gifted his kāṇi village Kaṟṟalēri-piḍāgai with all its tax revenue to the temple of Tirukkuṉṟākkuḍi-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār in view of his getting asylum from Piḷḷai Narasiṅgadēvar of Iraṇḍumalai-nāḍu. The latter would also get the first honour in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pokkaṇa Uṭaiyāṟku cellā ṉiṉṟa cupā
ṉuvaruṣam Āvaṇi mātam 2 10 2 nāḷ kāṭṭu nāṭāṉa ceyaciṅka kula
kāla vaḷa nāṭṭu vaṭapaṉaiñ kāṭṭuṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirukku
ṉṟākkuṭiyuṭaiya nāyiṉārkku kōṉāṭāṉa kaṭala
ṭaiyātilaṅkai koṇṭa cōḻavaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakō
ṉāṭṭu pērāmpūr Aracu Aṭaikkalaṅkāttārāṉa
naraciṅka tēvarēṉ kalluveṭṭikkuṭuttapaṭi yen
kāṇiyāṉa kaṟṟalērippiṭākai perunāṉ kellai
kkuṭpaṭṭa nattam nañcai puñcai kuḷaṟ pācippāṭṭamu
mēṉōkkiya maramum kīṇōkkiya kiṇaṟum maṟṟum
meppēṟpaṭṭa cuvantiramum nāyiṉāṟkuc cantirātitta
varaiyun tēvatāṉamāka koṭutta Aḷavukku Ivvū
rai nōkki varum kaṭamai kuṭimai Eṟcōṟu viṉivōka
m veṭṭi muṭṭāvāḷ paṭṭaṭai ciṟṟāyam taṟikkaṭamai
maṟṟum meppēṟpaṭṭavum nāyiṉārē peṟakkaṭavā
rākavum Irācakara maṟṟum mēṟpaṭṭaṉavum Ivvūrai
nōkkivarum tellām nāṉē poruṭ collak ka
ṭavēṉākavum yirācatalai Oḻintu Iṉakku Oruviṉaiyuṇṭā
ṉāl Ampum cōṟum paṭṭu kāttu nōkkak kaṭavarkaḷākavu ku
nayiṉārāṉa Iraṇṭu malaiṉāṭṭu piḷḷai naraciṅka tēvar Ik
kōyilil munṉoṭukku peṟakkaṭavarākavum Ikka kalveṭṭupa
ṭi cantirātittavaraiyum naṭattip pōtakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi
kku naraciṅka tēvar Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.365 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
